data.content: Found the issue. The solution file is missing project build configuration mappings. Let me verify:
data.reasoningText:
The solution file isn't actually building the projects when built directly. This is likely because the solution file has non-standard GUIDs or is missing the project configuration section. Let me check this more carefully.

The .sln file is missing `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` in the `Global` section, which maps solution configurations to project configurations. Without this, MSBuild doesn't know which projects to build in which configuration.
